no-restricted-syntax.selector: JSXText[value=/(加载中…?|Loading\.\.\.|Loading…|暂无(数据|消息|活动)|No data\.?)/]
no-restricted-syntax.message: no-raw-state-literal: use <LoadingState />, <EmptyState />, <ErrorState /> from @/components/state instead of a raw JSX literal. If this is truly illustrative (e.g., a button demo), move it to app/design-lab or add `// eslint-disable-next-line no-restricted-syntax` with a one-line reason.
